query: NE555 NE555-compatible (various vendors) Timer IC / electronic components 5 V volt DIP-8 (common) astable multivibrator adjustable frequency (via R/C) single-supply operation suitable for LED driving with current limiting resistor NE555 555 timer astable mode astable (oscillator) targetFrequency 10 Hz timingFormula f = 1.44 / ((R1 + 2*R2) * C) exampleValues C = 0.1 uF, R1 = 1 kΩ, R2 ≈ 680 kΩ (gives ~10.6 Hz) — R2 ≈720 kΩ gives ~10.0 Hz expectedDutyCycle ~50% (with R1 << R2; calculated = (R1+R2)/(R1+2R2)) decouplingCap 0.1 uF between Vcc and GND recommended led standard LED (e.g., 5 mm) ledResistorCalculation R_LED ≈ (Vcc - V_f_LED) / I_LED exampleLedResistor for Vcc=5V and V_f≈2.0V: R ≈ 300 Ω for 10 mA, 470 Ω for ≈6.4 mA outputCurrent NE555 can typically source/sink up to ~200 mA peak (practical LED current typically 5–20 mA) recommendedPartsList 1× NE555 timer IC (DIP-8), 1× timing capacitor (0.1 µF), 1× R1 (1 kΩ), 1× R2 (680–720 kΩ), 1× LED, 1× R_LED (330–470 Ω), 1× 0.1 µF decoupling cap, optional 10 µF supply cap, hookup wires/breadboard notes Values given are typical starting points. Use the timing formula to adjust R and C for exact frequency; R values too low increase supply current and may stress the IC; keep timing resistor values within manufacturer recommendations.
